# AccountabilityOf (accountabilityof.ai)

> Tamper-evident audit logs for every AI decision.

Capture an immutable, append-only trail of every prompt, tool call and model decision — so you can answer regulators, auditors and incident reviews with proof.

## What this is
AccountabilityOf is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- agent-audit-logger-mcp.record: Append a tamper-evident audit record for any AI decision from any MCP client.
- ai-incident-reporting-mcp.export: Generate a regulator-ready incident pack from logged AI decision trails.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://accountabilityof.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://accountabilityof.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://accountabilityof.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://accountabilityof.ai/pricing/
